name: vector-frankl
description: High-performance vector database that runs entirely in the browser using IndexedDB
author: Steve Kinney <hello@stevekinney.net>

scripts.build:cjs: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json --outDir dist/cjs --declaration false --declarationMap false --emitDeclarationOnly false --module CommonJS
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run build
scripts.test: r=0; bun test --timeout 30000 --path-ignore-patterns '**/*.benchmark.test.ts' src tests/unit tests/compression tests/debug tests/debug-mock.test.ts || r=$?; bun test --timeout 30000 --path-ignore-patterns '**/*.benchmark.test.ts' tests/gpu tests/integration tests/search || r=$?; bun test --timeout 30000 --path-ignore-patterns '**/*.benchmark.test.ts' tests/vectors tests/wasm tests/workers || r=$?; bun test --timeout 30000 --path-ignore-patterns '**/*.benchmark.test.ts' tests/storage || r=$?; exit $r
scripts.test:all: bun run test && bun run test:end-to-end
scripts.test:coverage: r=0; bun test --coverage --timeout 30000 --path-ignore-patterns '**/*.benchmark.test.ts' src tests/unit tests/compression tests/debug tests/debug-mock.test.ts || r=$?; bun test --coverage --timeout 30000 --path-ignore-patterns '**/*.benchmark.test.ts' tests/gpu || r=$?; bun test --coverage --timeout 30000 --path-ignore-patterns '**/*.benchmark.test.ts' tests/integration || r=$?; bun test --coverage --timeout 30000 --path-ignore-patterns '**/*.benchmark.test.ts' tests/search || r=$?; bun test --coverage --timeout 30000 --path-ignore-patterns '**/*.benchmark.test.ts' tests/vectors tests/wasm tests/workers || r=$?; bun test --coverage --timeout 30000 --path-ignore-patterns '**/*.benchmark.test.ts' tests/storage || r=$?; exit $r
scripts.test:parallel: r=0; bun test --parallel --timeout 30000 --path-ignore-patterns '**/*.benchmark.test.ts' src tests/unit tests/compression tests/debug tests/debug-mock.test.ts || r=$?; bun test --parallel --timeout 30000 --path-ignore-patterns '**/*.benchmark.test.ts' tests/gpu tests/integration tests/search || r=$?; bun test --parallel --timeout 30000 --path-ignore-patterns '**/*.benchmark.test.ts' tests/vectors tests/wasm tests/workers || r=$?; bun test --parallel --timeout 30000 --path-ignore-patterns '**/*.benchmark.test.ts' tests/storage || r=$?; exit $r
scripts.test:watch: bun test --watch --timeout 30000 --path-ignore-patterns '**/*.benchmark.test.ts' src tests/unit tests/compression tests/debug tests/gpu tests/integration tests/search tests/storage tests/vectors tests/wasm tests/workers tests/debug-mock.test.ts
